name: Scalloped Rutabaga & Apple Combo
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the rutabaga until tender, then drain any excess liquid and mash it.
2. Add 1 tablespoon margarine to the mashed rutabaga.
3. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Toss the sliced apples with 1/4 cup brown sugar and cinnamon.
5. Arrange alternating layers of mashed rutabaga and sliced apples in a greased 2-quart casserole dish, starting and ending with rutabaga.
6. Mix together flour, 1/3 cup brown sugar, and 2 tablespoons margarine until crumbly.
7. Sprinkle the mixture over the top of the casserole.
8. Bake for 1 hour. Serves 6.
